_publications._publicationTitle: COMT Val(158)Met Polymorphism Is Associated with Verbal Working Memory in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: No significant differences in performance according to  1 COMT  genotype were found for the digit-span forward (χ 2  = 1.06,  p  = 0.587), Corsi block-tapping task forward (χ 2  = 4.29,  p  = 0.117) and backward (χ 2  = 3.27,  p  = 0.195)
details: No significant differences found between COMT genotype groups for forward (χ² = 4.29, p = 0.117) and backward (χ² = 3.27, p = 0.195) conditions
